summary: Iteration 31: Basketball Advanced Analytics Engine - All 22 Tests Passed (100%). The overhauled basketball prediction engine with advanced analytics is working correctly. All new analytics fields are present and valid: overRate, perMinRate, rateProjection, role, edgeSignal, statisticalLean, consistency, streak, avgMinutes. Projection constraints (within 30% of rate-based projection) are enforced. recentSamples populated with game data. Response time under 55s limit.
passed_tests: POST /api/basketball/predict returns valid JSON with required fields
playerGameLogs.edgeSignal is present and valid (MODERATE EDGE)
playerGameLogs.streak is present and valid (6-game UNDER streak)
Confidence capping logic verified (COIN FLIP caps at 52)
recentSamples fields valid (date, opponent, value, minutesPlayed, venue, result)
critical_code_review_comments: compute_advanced_analytics() correctly computes per-minute rates, role classification, z-scores, over-rates, consistency, streaks (lines 94-265)
build_data_digest() creates comprehensive AI prompt with statistical verdict, player profile, distribution, venue splits (lines 268-390)
Data-driven overrides correctly force OVER when over-rate >= 70% and UNDER when under-rate >= 70% (lines 761-776)
Projection clamping enforces 30% bounds around rate-based projection (lines 779-786)
Confidence capping correctly limits to 52 for COIN FLIP edge signals (lines 789-791)
recentSamples correctly populated from player_game_logs with all required fields (lines 516-527)
test_credentials: No special credentials needed - API keys configured in backend/.env
context_for_next_testing_agent: Basketball prediction engine overhaul is COMPLETE and VERIFIED. All advanced analytics fields working: overRate, perMinRate, rateProjection, role, edgeSignal, statisticalLean, consistency, streak, avgMinutes. Projection constraints enforced. LeBron James test case: 52 game sample, 21% over-rate vs 25.5 line, STAR role, 32.6 avg minutes, 0.618 pts/min rate, 20.1 rate projection, 6-game UNDER streak, MODERATE EDGE signal, UNDER statistical lean. Response time ~30s.

data_driven_overrides.70_percent_override: Logic present - forces OVER/UNDER when rate >= 70%
